outcomeLine: Sharpen doubles patterns under pressure—then walk off the court knowing you earned every rep.
sessionObjective: LiveBall is a high-intensity, coach-fed doubles session. The coach feeds every ball so there is no serving—just continuous action that sharpens positioning, patterns, and finishing while keeping your heart rate up.
howItWorks: Doubles only. Two players hold the Champions side (king of the court); two Challengers try to take their spot.
The coach stands on the Champions side with a full basket and feeds every point—serves are not used in this format.
Challengers need three points before Champions earn two to win the exchange; when Challengers win, they become the new Champions.
Rotations stay quick so everyone cycles in and out—expect a fast pace and minimal standing around.

firstBall.title: First ball on each point
firstBall.intro: The first feed to a new challenging pair has extra structure so the point starts clean:
bullets: The Challenger at the baseline hits toward a target the coach calls—forehand or backhand crosscourt, inside-out forehand, or an “open” ball where you choose.
The Champions’ net player does not poach that first ball unless the feed is an open ball.
Miss the first ball and your team rotates out; a clean winner can move you straight to the Champion side. Your coach reviews house rules at the start of each session.

sessionStructure.title: Inside a 90-minute session
sessionStructure.subtitle: Six 15-minute blocks—movement prep, then pattern work, then open decision-making.

blocks.label: Block 1
blocks.title: Dynamic warm-up
blocks.detail: Footwork, split-steps, cooperative groundstrokes and short volley warm-up.

blocks.label: Block 2
blocks.title: Forehand crosscourt
blocks.detail: Deuce-side patterns and spacing; first-ball targets as announced.

blocks.label: Block 4
blocks.title: Forehand inside-out
blocks.detail: Turn defense into offense from the ad court.

blocks.label: Block 5
blocks.title: Forehand open ball
blocks.detail: Choose line or cross; net player may poach when the feed allows.

blocks.label: Block 6
blocks.title: Backhand open ball
blocks.detail: Shot selection and finishing—highest intensity of the hour.

testimonial.quote: I joined for cardio, but the biggest shift has been doubles tactics—where to stand, when to help at net, and how to close points together. My partner and I finally move as one unit.
testimonial.author: Member, adult LiveBall
testimonial.replaceBeforePublish: Swap this placeholder with a member-approved quote when available.

culture.communication: Call the ball, switch when you cross, and keep talking with your partner—LiveBall is doubles-first.
culture.safety: Hydrate when you need to; step off if something feels off. We keep the basket full and the time between points short.
